svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="低代码平台运行逻辑" id="adbg-2"> <mxGraphModel dx="-564" dy="-179" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1080" pageHeight="620" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="G_TOP" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="前端运行链路" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="1000" x="40" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="A" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="业务人员 / 开发人员" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="170" x="64" y="245" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="B" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;" value="低代码平台
(拖拽配置 + 组件库)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="66" width="200" x="284" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="C" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;" value="前端渲染引擎
(组件复用 / 数据流配置)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="66" width="220" x="540" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="G" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="多端适配
H5 / 小程序 / APP / PC 端" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="200" x="820" y="95" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="D" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="Egg.js BFF 层
(接口聚合)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="200" x="540" y="245" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="SpringBoot 后端
(上下文注入)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="200" x="794" y="245" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="G_DATA" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f0fdfa;strokeColor=#5eead4;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#134e4a;spacingTop=6;" value="数据层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="1000" x="40" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="F" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;" value="MySQL + Redis
(数据交互 / 缓存)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="240" x="420" y="445" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EAB" edge="1" parent="1" source="A" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="B" value="拖拽配置"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EBC" edge="1" parent="1" source="B" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="C" value="组件复用 / 数据流配置"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EBD" edge="1" parent="1" source="B" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="D" value="接口聚合"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ECG" edge="1" parent="1" source="C" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="G" value="多端适配"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EDE" edge="1" parent="1" source="D" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="E" value="上下文注入"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EEF" edge="1" parent="1" source="E" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#134e4a;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.7;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="F" value="数据交互"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="EDF" edge="1" parent="1" source="D" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#134e4a;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.3;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="F" value="接口数据"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
